playbook.intent: Backlog under 100 items, every item has an owner plus score plus tag, stale items archived; the top-20 ready-to-pull queue exists.
playbook.scope: Backlog under 100 items, every item has an owner plus score plus tag, stale items archived; the top-20 ready-to-pull queue exists.

success-criteria.criterion: Every item has owner, tag, and score
Graveyard has one-line rationale per item

stage.name: Audit size

tasks.task: Identify items older than 90 days with no movement
Move stale items to a graveyard

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the backlog is under 100 items.

stage.name: Tag + own
stage.intent: Every item gets a theme tag and an owner.

tasks.task: Reject items without an owner — close or assign

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every item has a tag and an owner.

stage.name: Score
stage.intent: Run MoSCoW pass; RICE for the top quartile.

tasks.task: Note the OKR each item ties to

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every item has a MoSCoW class.

stage.name: Top-20 queue

tasks.task: Confirm each has AC + dependencies surfaced

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 20 items pass the ready definition.

stage.name: Graveyard rationale
stage.intent: Make 'never' loud so it does not return.

tasks.task: For every archived item, write a one-line rationale
File the graveyard list separately from active backlog

stage.decision-gate: Required: every graveyard item has a one-line reason.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content backlog-grooming-prioritization-session --format md, agent: faion get-content backlog-grooming-prioritization-session --format context, json: faion get-content backlog-grooming-prioritization-session --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
